text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "On semiamarts, amarts, and processes with finite value" by Ulrich Krengel and Louis Sucheston is widely confirmed across multiple academic sources as a real 1978 publication in *Probability on Banach Spaces* (Advances in Probability, Vol. 4, Dekker, New York, pp. 197–266), with MR number 515432. The authors and venue match the cited reference exactly.
LINK: https://www.ams.org/proc/1983-088-01/S0002-9939-1983-0691293-4/
